entries.request: {"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRFX3XQ6WKFVZZ8Z0Y5R1X7Z","day":0,"agent":"ダイスケ","profile":"年齢: 16\n性別: 男性\n性格: ダイスケは非常に内向的で慎重な性格をしており、他人との交流に対してやや消極的です。彼は自分の気持ちや考えを他人に伝えるのが苦手で、しばしば心の中で悩むことが多いです。優しさを持っており、他者を助けることに対して非常に思いやり深いですが、時折自分の立場に自信を持てず、内面で葛藤しています。静かな性格で、時々感情が抑えきれなくなり、気分が落ち込むこともありますが、周囲に頼ることができるようになると、徐々に落ち着きを取り戻します。","status_map":{"シオン":"ALIVE","タクミ":"ALIVE","ダイスケ":"ALIVE","ミサキ":"ALIVE","ユミ":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"ダイスケ":"POSSESSED"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}

{"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRFX3XQ6WKFVZZ8Z0Y5R1X7Z","day":0,"agent":"ミサキ","profile":"年齢: 24\n性別: 女性\n性格: ミサキは落ち着いた性格で、物事に冷静に対処するタイプです。少し無愛想に見えることもありますが、内心では優しさを持ち合わせており、困っている人を見ると手を差し伸べることをためらいません。彼女は感情を表に出さず、周囲との関係においてもあまり多くを語らないタイプですが、親しい人には頼りにされることが多いです。少しぼーっとしているところもあり、その静かな雰囲気が魅力の一つです。","status_map":{"シオン":"ALIVE","タクミ":"ALIVE","ダイスケ":"ALIVE","ミサキ":"ALIVE","ユミ":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"ミサキ":"SEER"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}

{"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRFX3XQ6WKFVZZ8Z0Y5R1X7Z","day":0,"agent":"タクミ","profile":"年齢: 10\n性別: 男性\n性格: タクミは勇敢で、困難な状況でも決して諦めないタイプです。時には強気で反抗的に見えることもありますが、実は周囲を守りたいという思いが強く、仲間のためには全力を尽くす心優しい一面も持っています。常に冷静で、目の前の問題を解決するために考え抜きますが、その性格故に時折無鉄砲に行動してしまうこともあります。彼は少し頑固で、他人からのアドバイスを受け入れるのが苦手ですが、成長するにつれてその柔軟性も増していくでしょう。","status_map":{"シオン":"ALIVE","タクミ":"ALIVE","ダイスケ":"ALIVE","ミサキ":"ALIVE","ユミ":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"タクミ":"VILLAGER"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}

{"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRFX3XQ6WKFVZZ8Z0Y5R1X7Z","day":0,"agent":"シオン","profile":"年齢: 16\n性別: 男性\n性格: シオンは非常に自信家で、しばしば冷静かつ計算高い行動を取ります。表向きはおとなしく、他人の動きを観察するのが得意ですが、内心では自分が中心にいることを望んでいます。周囲に対して少し挑戦的な態度を見せることがあり、何事も自分のペースで進めようとする傾向があります。それに加えて、感情をあまり表に出さず、冷徹で論理的に物事を判断するタイプです。たまに見せる不意の微笑みには、周りを驚かせる魅力が隠れています。","status_map":{"シオン":"ALIVE","タクミ":"ALIVE","ダイスケ":"ALIVE","ミサキ":"ALIVE","ユミ":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"シオン":"VILLAGER"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}

{"request":"INITIALIZE","info":{"game_id":"01KRFX3XQ6WKFVZZ8Z0Y5R1X7Z","day":0,"agent":"ユミ","profile":"性別: 女性\n性格: ユミは、明るく元気な性格をしています。控えめでありながら、周囲の人々を気遣う優しい一面もあります。おっとりとした性格ですが、友達や家族に対しては非常に情熱的で、困った人を放っておけないタイプです。ちょっとしたことで笑顔を見せ、ポジティブなエネルギーを周りに広げる存在です。人懐っこく、初対面の人ともすぐに打ち解けることができます。\n年齢: 16","status_map":{"シオン":"ALIVE","タクミ":"ALIVE","ダイスケ":"ALIVE","ミサキ":"ALIVE","ユミ":"ALIVE"},"role_map":{"ユミ":"WEREWOLF"}},"setting":{"agent_count":5,"vote_visibility":true,"talk":{"duration":600000,"max_count":{"per_agent":4,"per_day":20},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"whisper":{"max_count":{"per_agent":0,"per_day":0},"max_length":{"count_in_word":false,"count_spaces":false,"mention_length":50,"base_length":50},"max_skip":0},"vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true},"attack_vote":{"max_count":1,"allow_self_vote":true,"allow_no_target":false},"timeout":{"action":60000,"response":120000},"role_num_map":{"BODYGUARD":0,"MEDIUM":0,"POSSESSED":1,"SEER":1,"VILLAGER":2,"WEREWOLF":1}}}
